title: MirrorTrace Public GitHub Leak Scan Input
description: Audits the SELF subject's OWN public GitHub footprint for self-committed secrets. Prohibited scopes are absent from the enum: account/repository enumeration is a dual-use technique, so only self/public_figure are accepted (consented/brand/safety_evidence intentionally cannot run this actor). This actor reads ONLY public GitHub data via the documented REST API and never bypasses authentication.

scope_type.title: Scope type
scope_type.description: Dual-use account/repository scanning is permitted ONLY for your own footprint (self) or a genuine public figure acting publicly. consented / brand / safety_evidence are intentionally not offered here.

github_handle.title: Your GitHub username (handle)
github_handle.description: The GitHub login you OWN (or a public figure's publicly-listed handle). Only this account's PUBLIC profile, repos, and gists are scanned.

subject_label.title: Subject label
subject_label.description: Human label for the subject (e.g. your name). Used only for reporting.

max_repos.title: Max public repos to scan
max_repos.description: Upper bound on how many of the account's most-recently-pushed PUBLIC repos to scan. Keeps the run bounded and rate-limit friendly.

max_files_per_repo.title: Max candidate files per repo
max_files_per_repo.description: Upper bound on candidate text/config files inspected per repo. Only small, text-like files at the repo root tree are considered.

include_gists.title: Also scan public gists
include_gists.description: If true, the account's PUBLIC gists are scanned in addition to repositories.
